name: Portable Cabin
description:
SAMAN builds eleven portable cabin products — from a ₹1,35,000 compact unit up to a ₹51,55,500 multi-room building — so the real question isn't what a portable cabin is, it's which one fits your use, footprint and budget. This page maps every unit to the job it does best and shows each one's starting price, so you can shortlist before you call. Every cabin is factory-built on a mild-steel frame and delivered ready to use.

Which portable cabin fits your use: office, shop, home or site?

Most buyers arrive knowing they want a portable cabin but not which configuration. Sort by what you're putting inside it. Workspace and offices. For a finished, fitted workspace at a new location, the fitted office cabin is built for daily office use. If your team will grow, the expandable modular cabin lets you add rooms later — and for a heavy mild-steel build meant for years of factory, institutional or retail use, the MS-framed cabin steps up the frame grade. Retail and stalls. A shopfront cabin gives you a kiosk or store with counter and shutter provision — no lease, no construction timeline. Home and compact use. For an extra room at home — guest room, study or store — the compact small cabin is the entry unit and the most common residential choice. Sites, heavy-duty and long-term. For a three-year-plus deployment or a site that needs crane placement, the heavy-duty container cabin is built to a stronger standard with cast-steel corner castings and a higher floor load. Where you need a working space with an attached toilet in one unit, the cabin with an attached toilet combines both. Buying off the shelf or to spec. The standard portable cabin is the all-rounder; ready-to-buy stock units ship fast when you can't wait; the factory-finished prefabricated cabin arrives complete with material documentation; and for a large layout, the multi-room cabin building scales to a full building footprint.

Portable cabin types, sizes and starting prices compared

This portable cabin price list sets the starting figure for each unit, so you can match a budget to a configuration at a glance. Footprint is shown as a tier — compact, standard, large or multi-room — because final dimensions are configured per order.
Product Best for Footprint From
Small Portable Cabin Compact home or office extra room Compact ₹1,35,000
Portable Shop Cabin Retail kiosk or shopfront Compact–Standard ₹1,75,000
MS Portable Cabin Long-term mild-steel-frame use Standard ₹2,55,000
Container Portable Cabin Heavy sites, crane placement Standard (heavy) ₹3,35,000
Portable Cabin General all-rounder Standard ₹3,55,000
Prefabricated Portable Cabin Factory-finished, documented build Standard ₹4,15,000
Buy Portable Cabin Stock unit, fast despatch Standard ₹5,25,000
Portable Cabin with Toilet Workspace plus attached toilet Standard ₹7,45,000
Office Portable Cabin Fitted daily workspace Standard–Large ₹8,25,000
Modular Portable Cabin Expandable, add rooms later Large ₹9,55,000
Portable Cabin Building Multi-room building layout Multi-room ₹51,55,500
Starting prices are current SAMAN list prices; the final figure depends on the size and fit-out you configure, with exact dimensions shown on each product page.

How much does a portable cabin cost?

A portable cabin in India costs between ₹1,35,000 and ₹51,55,500 from SAMAN, decided mainly by which unit you choose. A compact small cabin sits at the entry point; a fitted office or expandable modular cabin is mid-range; and a complete multi-room cabin building sits at the top. Size, panel grade and interior fit-out set the final figure.

Buying your portable cabin range from a manufacturer, not a reseller

Many portable cabin listings online are resellers and aggregators quoting a vague per-square-foot rate. SAMAN is a portable cabin manufacturer: every unit in this range is fabricated in-house on a mild-steel frame with insulated PUF panels, so the ₹1,35,000 entry cabin and the multi-room building share the same structural standard. Ordering the full range from one maker means a single point for customisation, consistent build quality across several units on the same project, and one delivery and after-sales contact instead of chasing multiple suppliers. Units are built to your size and fit-out and delivered across South India and Delhi NCR. For the full specification of the standard unit and how it ships, see our portable cabin range overview.

Portable cabin range: common buyer questions

Is SAMAN a portable cabin manufacturer or a reseller?

SAMAN manufactures every unit in-house rather than reselling, which is why the same build standard runs from the entry cabin to the multi-room building and why customisation, quality and after-sales all sit with one contact.

What's the difference between a portable cabin and a portable cabin building?

A portable cabin is a single relocatable unit for one main use. A portable cabin building is a larger multi-room layout for several functions or a bigger team — it sits at the top of the range and is priced and configured as a full building.

Can a portable cabin be customised and moved to another site?

Yes. Size, partitions, windows, flooring and fit-out are configured to order, and the mild-steel frame is built to be dismantled, relocated and reassembled at a new site, so the spend carries forward.

Is the starting price the final price?

The "from" figure is the base starting price for each unit. The final quote depends on the size you choose, panel grade, interior fit-out and any plumbing or electrical additions — each product page lists its own starting point.

Get a portable cabin quote

Tell us your use and footprint and we'll point you to the right unit with an exact price. Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 | WhatsApp +91 88616 22859 Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 | WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
